description_long: This is an acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a natural wood finish and a visible sound hole at the center of the body. The top, back, and sides are made of wood, with a slightly curved back and a flat top. The neck is long and slender, leading up to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged symmetrically, three on each side. The bridge is a simple wooden piece, and the fretboard is marked with dot inlays. The guitar has a smooth, matte surface with visible wood grain, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. There are no visible electronic components or pickups, indicating it is a purely acoustic instrument.
description: A natural wood-finished acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body, six tuning pegs, and a smooth, matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sound hole, bridge, fretboard, and six tuning pegs.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's body thickness and the neck's slimness.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the curved wooden back and the rear of the headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body depth and neck alignment.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard acoustic headstock with three tuning pegs on each side, no visible logo, and a simple rectangular shape.
